    <script>
        let allBooks = [], selectedGbBook = null, csvSelectedFile = null;
        let _plazoGlobal = 7; // plazo por defecto, se actualiza desde la BD al cargar préstamos
        let _todosActivos = [], _todosRetrasos = [];
        function showTab(id, btn) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.tab-panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
            document.querySelectorAll('#mainTabs .tab-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
            document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active');
            btn.classList.add('active');
            // Show/hide loan options based on tab
            const contextOpts = document.getElementById('loan-context-options');
            if (contextOpts) {
                contextOpts.style.display = (id === 'tab-prestamos') ? 'flex' : 'none';
            }
        }
        function showCatTab(id, btn) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.cat-panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
            document.querySelectorAll('#tab-libros .pst-tab-pill').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
            document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active');
            btn.classList.add('active');
        }
        let rankingChartInstance = null;
        function loadRankingChart() {
            fetch('/api/ranking/lectura')
                .then(r => r.json())
                .then(data => {
                    const ctx = document.getElementById('rankingChart').getContext('2d');
                    if (rankingChartInstance) rankingChartInstance.destroy();
                    const labels = data.map(i => i.nombre);
                    const values = data.map(i => i.total_lecturas);
                    rankingChartInstance = new Chart(ctx, {
                        type: 'bar',
                        data: {
                            labels: labels,
                            datasets: [{
                                label: 'Libros leídos',
                                data: values,
                                backgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 51, 102, 0.7)',
                                borderColor: 'rgba(0, 51, 102, 1)',
                                borderWidth: 1,
                                borderRadius: 6
                            }]
                        },
                        options: {
                            indexAxis: 'y',
                            responsive: true,
                            maintainAspectRatio: false,
                            plugins: { legend: { display: false } },
                            scales: {
                                x: { beginAtZero: true, ticks: { stepSize: 1, color: '#666' } },
                                y: { ticks: { color: '#003366', font: { weight: 'bold' } } }
                            }
                        }
                    });
                });
        }
        let selectedBookIds = []; // IDS de libros seleccionados

        function updateSelectionUI() {
            const bar = document.getElementById('selectionBar');
            const count = document.getElementById('selectionCount');
            if (selectedBookIds.length > 0) {
                bar.style.display = 'flex';
                count.textContent = `${selectedBookIds.length} seleccionados`;
            } else {
                bar.style.display = 'none';
                document.getElementById('selectAll').checked = false;
            }
        }

        function toggleBookSelection(id) {
            const idx = selectedBookIds.indexOf(id);
            if (idx > -1) selectedBookIds.splice(idx, 1);
            else selectedBookIds.push(id);
            updateSelectionUI();
        }

        function toggleSelectAll(checked) {
            if (checked) {
                // Seleccionar solo los libros actualmente visibles en el catálogo
                const visibleIds = window._librosActuales.map(b => b.id);
                selectedBookIds = [...new Set([...selectedBookIds, ...visibleIds])];
            } else {
                // Deseleccionar los visibles
                const visibleIds = window._librosActuales.map(b => b.id);
                selectedBookIds = selectedBookIds.filter(id => !visibleIds.includes(id));
            }
            renderBooks(window._librosActuales);
            updateSelectionUI();
        }

        async function deleteSelectedBooks() {
            if (!selectedBookIds.length) return;
            if (!confirm(`¿Estás seguro de que quieres eliminar los ${selectedBookIds.length} libros seleccionados?`)) return;

            try {
                const response = await fetch('/api/libros/bulk-delete', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify({ ids: selectedBookIds })
                });
                const d = await response.json();
                if (d.ok) {
                    alert(d.mensaje);
                    selectedBookIds = [];
                    updateSelectionUI();
                    loadBooks();
                    loadStats();
                } else {
                    alert(`Error: ${d.error}`);
                }
            } catch (e) {
                alert(`Error de red: ${e}`);
            }
        }

        async function loadStats() {
            try {
                const d = await (await fetch('/api/estadisticas/lectura')).json();
                document.getElementById('st-libros').textContent = d.total_libros;
                document.getElementById('st-prestamos').textContent = d.total_prestamos;
                document.getElementById('st-activos').textContent = d.prestamos_activos;
                document.getElementById('st-top').textContent = d.libro_popular ? d.libro_popular.titulo : '-';
            } catch (e) { }
        }
        function normalizeString(str) {
            if (!str) return '';
            return str.toLowerCase().normalize("NFD").replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, "");
        }
        async function loadBooks() {
            const r = await fetch('/api/libros');
            allBooks = await r.json();
            filterBooks();
        }
        function filterBooks() {
            const q = normalizeString(document.getElementById('searchInput').value);
            const nivel = document.getElementById('filterNivel').value;
            const stockFilter = document.getElementById('filterStock').value;
            const sortBy = document.getElementById('sortBooks').value;
            let filtered = allBooks.filter(b => {
                const matchSearch = (!q || normalizeString(b.titulo || '').includes(q) || normalizeString(b.autor || '').includes(q));
                const matchNivel = (!nivel || b.nivel_lectura === nivel);
                const matchStock = (stockFilter === 'todos') ||
                    (stockFilter === 'disponibles' && b.cantidad_disponible > 0) ||
                    (stockFilter === 'agotados' && b.cantidad_disponible === 0);
                return matchSearch && matchNivel && matchStock;
            });
            if (sortBy === 'titulo') {
                filtered.sort((a, b) => (a.titulo || '').localeCompare(b.titulo || ''));
            } else if (sortBy === 'autor') {
                filtered.sort((a, b) => (a.autor || '').localeCompare(b.autor || ''));
            } else if (sortBy === 'stock_desc') {
                filtered.sort((a, b) => b.cantidad_disponible - a.cantidad_disponible);
            } else if (sortBy === 'stock_asc') {
                filtered.sort((a, b) => a.cantidad_disponible - b.cantidad_disponible);
            }
            window._librosActuales = filtered;
            renderBooks(filtered);
        }
        let currentView = localStorage.getItem('bibliotecaView') || 'grid';
        function setView(v) {
            currentView = v;
            localStorage.setItem('bibliotecaView', v);
            document.getElementById('btnGrid').classList.toggle('active', v === 'grid');
            document.getElementById('btnList').classList.toggle('active', v === 'list');
            const grid = document.getElementById('booksGrid');
            grid.className = v === 'list' ? 'books-list' : 'books-grid';
            filterBooks();
        }
        function renderBooks(books) {
            const container = document.getElementById('booksGrid');
            container.className = currentView === 'list' ? 'books-list' : 'books-grid';
            if (!books.length) {
                container.innerHTML = `<div class="empty-state" style="grid-column:1/-1"><div class="icon">📭</div><p>No se encontraron libros.</p></div>`;
                return;
            }
            container.innerHTML = books.map(b => {
                const agotado = b.cantidad_disponible === 0;
                const isSelected = selectedBookIds.includes(b.id);
                const cls = agotado ? 'avail-none' : (b.cantidad_disponible <= 1 ? 'avail-low' : 'avail-ok');
                const cardCls = agotado ? 'book-card book-card-agotado' : 'book-card';
                const cover = b.portada && b.portada.startsWith('http')
                    ? `<div class="book-cover"><img src="${b.portada}" alt="${b.titulo}" onerror="this.parentElement.innerHTML='📖'"></div>`
                    : `<div class="book-cover" style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:2rem;background:#f8fafc;">📖</div>`;
                const checkbox = `<input type="checkbox" class="book-checkbox" onchange="toggleBookSelection(${b.id})" ${isSelected ? 'checked' : ''}>`;
                if (currentView === 'list') {
                    return `<div class="${cardCls}">
                        ${checkbox}
                        ${cover}
                        <div class="book-info">
                            <div class="book-title">${b.titulo}</div>
                            <div class="book-author">${b.autor || 'Autor desconocido'}</div>
                            <div class="book-meta">${[b.nivel_lectura, b.genero, b.año_publicacion].filter(Boolean).join(' · ')} &nbsp;<span class="avail-badge ${cls}">${b.cantidad_disponible}/${b.cantidad_total}${agotado ? ' — Sin existencias' : ''}</span></div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="book-actions">
                            ${!agotado ? `<button class="btn btn-success btn-sm" onclick="openPrestamoRapido(${b.id}, '${b.titulo.replace(/'/g, "\\'")}', '${b.autor ? b.autor.replace(/'/g, "\\'") : ''}')" title="Prestar Libro" style="padding: 4px 10px; font-size: .85rem;">📤 Prestar</button>` : ''}
                            <button class="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onclick="openEdit(${b.id})" title="Editar">✏️</button>
                            <button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm" onclick="deleteBook(${b.id},'${b.titulo.replace(/'/g, "\\'")}')" title="Eliminar">🗑️</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>`;
                } else {
                    return `<div class="${cardCls}">
                        ${checkbox}
                        ${cover}
                        <div class="book-title">${b.titulo}</div>
                        <div class="book-author">${b.autor || 'Autor desconocido'}</div>
                        <div class="book-meta">${[b.nivel_lectura, b.genero, b.año_publicacion].filter(Boolean).join(' · ')}</div>
                        <span class="avail-badge ${cls}">${b.cantidad_disponible}/${b.cantidad_total}${agotado ? ' — Sin existencias' : ' disponibles'}</span>
                        ${!agotado ? `<button class="btn btn-success btn-sm" style="width:100%; margin-top: 10px;" onclick="openPrestamoRapido(${b.id}, '${b.titulo.replace(/'/g, "\\'")}', '${b.autor ? b.autor.replace(/'/g, "\\'") : ''}')">📤 Prestar</button>` : ''}
                        <div class="book-actions">
                            <button class="btn btn-outline btn-sm" style="flex:1" onclick="openEdit(${b.id})">✏️ Editar</button>
                            <button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm" style="flex:1" onclick="deleteBook(${b.id},'${b.titulo.replace(/'/g, "\\'")}')">🗑️</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>`;
                }
            }).join('');
        }
        async function submitBook(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            const body = { titulo: document.getElementById('f-titulo').value, autor: document.getElementById('f-autor').value, isbn: document.getElementById('f-isbn').value, editorial: document.getElementById('f-editorial').value, año_publicacion: document.getElementById('f-año').value || null, cantidad_total: parseInt(document.getElementById('f-cantidad').value) || 1, nivel_lectura: document.getElementById('f-nivel').value, genero: document.getElementById('f-genero').value, descripcion: document.getElementById('f-desc').value };
            const d = await (await fetch('/api/libros', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify(body)
            })).json();
            const el = document.getElementById('formAlert');
            if (d.ok) { el.innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-success">✅ ${d.mensaje}</div>`; document.getElementById('bookForm').reset(); document.getElementById('f-cantidad').value = 1; loadBooks(); loadStats(); setTimeout(() => el.innerHTML = '', 3000); }
            else el.innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-danger">❌ ${d.error}</div>`;
        }
        function openEdit(id) {
            const b = allBooks.find(x => x.id === id); if (!b) return;
            ['id', 'titulo', 'autor', 'isbn', 'editorial'].forEach(f => document.getElementById('e-' + f).value = b[f] || '');
            document.getElementById('e-año').value = b.año_publicacion || '';
            document.getElementById('e-cantidad').value = b.cantidad_total;
            document.getElementById('e-nivel').value = b.nivel_lectura || '';
            document.getElementById('e-genero').value = b.genero || '';
            document.getElementById('e-desc').value = b.descripcion || '';
            document.getElementById('editAlert').innerHTML = '';
            document.getElementById('editModal').style.display = 'flex';
        }
        async function submitEdit(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            const id = document.getElementById('e-id').value;
            const body = { titulo: document.getElementById('e-titulo').value, autor: document.getElementById('e-autor').value, isbn: document.getElementById('e-isbn').value, editorial: document.getElementById('e-editorial').value, año_publicacion: document.getElementById('e-año').value || null, cantidad_total: parseInt(document.getElementById('e-cantidad').value) || 1, nivel_lectura: document.getElementById('e-nivel').value, genero: document.getElementById('e-genero').value, descripcion: document.getElementById('e-desc').value };
            const d = await (await fetch(`/api/libros/${id}`, {
                method: 'PUT',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify(body)
            })).json();
            if (d.ok) { closeModal('editModal'); loadBooks(); loadStats(); }
            else document.getElementById('editAlert').innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-danger">❌ ${d.error}</div>`;
        }
        async function deleteBook(id, titulo) {
            if (!confirm(`¿Eliminar "${titulo}"?`)) return;
            const d = await (await fetch(`/api/libros/${id}`, { method: 'DELETE' })).json();
            if (d.ok) { loadBooks(); loadStats(); } else alert(`Error: ${d.error}`);
        }
        function closeModal(id) {
            document.getElementById(id).style.display = 'none';
            if (id === 'historialAlumnoModal') {
                const sel = document.getElementById('h-alumno');
                if (sel) sel.value = '';
            }
        }
        // CSV
        function onDrop(e) { e.preventDefault(); e.currentTarget.classList.remove('dragover'); if (e.dataTransfer.files.length) onFileSelected(e.dataTransfer.files[0]); }
        function onFileSelected(file) { csvSelectedFile = file; document.getElementById('fileName').textContent = `${file.name} (${(file.size / 1024).toFixed(1)} KB)`; document.getElementById('fileInfo').style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('csvBtn').style.display = 'inline-block'; document.getElementById('csvAlert').innerHTML = ''; }
        async function importCSV() {
            if (!csvSelectedFile) return;
            const fd = new FormData(); fd.append('file', csvSelectedFile);
            const btn = document.getElementById('csvBtn'); btn.textContent = '⏳ Importando...'; btn.disabled = true;
            try {
                const d = await (await fetch('/api/libros/importar/csv', { method: 'POST', body: fd })).json();
                let html = d.ok ? `<div class="alert alert-success">✅ ${d.mensaje} (${d.libros_importados}/${d.total_filas})</div>` : `<div class="alert alert-danger">❌ ${d.error}</div>`;
                if (d.ok && d.errores) html += `<div class="alert" style="background:#fff8e1;border-left:4px solid orange;color:#7a5c00;">⚠️ Errores: ${d.errores.join('<br>')}</div>`;
                document.getElementById('csvAlert').innerHTML = html;
                if (d.ok) { csvSelectedFile = null; document.getElementById('fileInfo').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('csvFile').value = ''; document.getElementById('csvBtn').style.display = 'none'; loadBooks(); loadStats(); }
            } finally { btn.textContent = '📤 Importar Libros'; btn.disabled = false; }
        }
        async function cleanupDuplicates() {
            if (!confirm('¿Seguro que quieres eliminar libros con el mismo título y autor?\nSe mantendrá solo la copia más antigua.')) return;
            const btn = document.getElementById('cleanupBtn');
            const originalText = btn.innerHTML;
            btn.innerHTML = '⏳ Limpiando...';
            btn.disabled = true;
            try {
                const d = await (await fetch('/api/libros/borrar-duplicados', { method: 'POST' })).json();
                if (d.ok) {
                    alert(d.mensaje);
                    loadBooks(); loadStats();
                } else {
                    alert(`Error: ${d.error}`);
                }
            } catch (e) {
                alert(`Error de red: ${e}`);
            } finally {
                btn.innerHTML = originalText;
                btn.disabled = false;
            }
        }
        // Google Books
        async function searchGoogleBooks() {
            const titulo = document.getElementById('gbSearchInput').value.trim(); if (!titulo) return;
            document.getElementById('gbResults').innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center;padding:30px;color:#888;">⏳ Buscando...</div>';
            document.getElementById('gbAlert').innerHTML = '';
            const d = await (await fetch(`/api/libros/buscar-google?titulo=${encodeURIComponent(titulo)}`)).json();
            if (!d.ok) { document.getElementById('gbAlert').innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-danger">❌ ${d.error}</div>`; document.getElementById('gbResults').innerHTML = ''; return; }
            if (!d.resultados.length) { document.getElementById('gbResults').innerHTML = '<div class="empty-state"><div class="icon">🔍</div><p>Sin resultados.</p></div>'; return; }
            window._gbResults = d.resultados;
            document.getElementById('gbResults').innerHTML = d.resultados.map((b, i) => `
        <div class="google-card" onclick="openGbImport(${i})">
            ${b.portada ? `<img src="${b.portada}" alt="${b.titulo}">` : `<div class="g-no-img">📖</div>`}
            <div class="g-title">${b.titulo}</div>
            <div class="g-author">${b.autor || ''}</div>
            <div style="font-size:.7rem;color:#999;margin-top:3px;">${[b.editorial, b.año_publicacion].filter(Boolean).join(' · ')}</div>
        </div>`).join('');
        }
        function openGbImport(i) {
            selectedGbBook = window._gbResults[i];
            document.getElementById('gbImportInfo').innerHTML = `<strong>${selectedGbBook.titulo}</strong><br><span style="color:#666;font-size:.85rem;">${selectedGbBook.autor || ''}</span>${selectedGbBook.editorial ? `<br><span style="color:#999;font-size:.8rem;">${selectedGbBook.editorial}</span>` : ''}`;
            document.getElementById('gb-cantidad').value = 1;
            document.getElementById('gb-nivel').value = '';
            document.getElementById('gb-genero').value = '';
            document.getElementById('gbImportModal').style.display = 'flex';
        }
        async function confirmGbImport() {
            if (!selectedGbBook) return;
            const body = { ...selectedGbBook, cantidad_total: parseInt(document.getElementById('gb-cantidad').value) || 1, nivel_lectura: document.getElementById('gb-nivel').value, genero: document.getElementById('gb-genero').value };
            const d = await (await fetch('/api/libros/importar-google', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify(body)
            })).json();
            if (d.ok) { closeModal('gbImportModal'); document.getElementById('gbAlert').innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-success">✅ ${d.mensaje}</div>`; loadBooks(); loadStats(); }
            else alert(`Error: ${d.error}`);
        }
        // ── PRÉSTAMOS TAB ──────────────────────────────────────────
        let _prestamosLoaded = false, _todosHistorial = [];
        function showSubTab(id, btn) {
            document.querySelectorAll('#tab-prestamos .tab-panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
            document.querySelectorAll('.pst-tab-pill').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
            document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active');
            btn.classList.add('active');
        }
        async function initPrestamos() {
            if (_prestamosLoaded) return;
            _prestamosLoaded = true;
            document.getElementById('p-fecha').value = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
            document.getElementById('dev-fecha').value = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
            // Init config
            try {
                const cfg = await (await fetch('/api/config')).json();
                _plazoGlobal = cfg.max_dias_prestamo || 7;
                const sel = document.getElementById('plazo-dias');
                if (sel) sel.value = _plazoGlobal;
            } catch (e) { }
            await Promise.all([_loadGruposPrest(), _loadLibrosPrest(), _loadActivos(), _loadRetrasos(), _loadHistorial()]);
            _updateStatsPrest();
        }
        async function _loadGruposPrest() {
            try {
                const r = await fetch('/api/grupos');
                const grupos = await r.json();
                const selG = document.getElementById('p-grupo');
                const prevVal = selG.value; // Guardar valor previo
                selG.innerHTML = '<option value="" style="color:#333;background:white;">-- Selecciona un grupo --</option>' +
                    grupos.map(g => `<option value="${g.id}" style="color:#333;background:white;">${g.nombre}</option>`).join('');
                
                // Restaurar valor previo si existe y es válido
                if (prevVal && grupos.some(g => g.id == prevVal)) {
                    selG.value = prevVal;
                } else if (grupos.length === 1) {
                    selG.value = grupos[0].id;
                    cargarAlumnosPorGrupo();
                }
            } catch (e) { console.error('Error loading groups:', e); }
        }
        let _alumnosDelGrupo = []; // Global to store active group students
        function filtrarAlumnosPrest() {
            const q = normalizeString(document.getElementById('p-alumno-search').value);
            const resDiv = document.getElementById('p-alumno-results');
            if (q.length === 0) {
                resDiv.style.display = 'none';
                return;
            }
            const filtered = _alumnosDelGrupo.filter(a => normalizeString(a.nombre).includes(q));
            if (filtered.length === 0) {
                resDiv.innerHTML = '<div style="padding:10px;color:#999;text-align:center;font-size:.85rem;">No hay coincidencias</div>';
            } else {
                resDiv.innerHTML = filtered.map(a => `
                    <div onclick="seleccionarAlumno(${a.id}, '${a.nombre.replace(/'/g, "\\'")}')" 
                         style="padding:10px 14px;cursor:pointer;border-bottom:1px solid #eee;font-size:0.9rem;color:#333;font-weight:500;"
                         onmouseover="this.style.background='#f5faff'" onmouseout="this.style.background='none'">
                         👤 ${a.nombre}
                    </div>
                `).join('');
            }
            resDiv.style.display = 'block';
        }
        function seleccionarAlumno(id, nombre) {
            document.getElementById('p-alumno').value = id;
            document.getElementById('p-alumno-search').value = nombre;
            document.getElementById('p-alumno-search').style.background = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.2)';
            document.getElementById('p-alumno-search').style.fontWeight = '800';
            document.getElementById('p-alumno-clear').style.display = 'block';
            document.getElementById('p-alumno-results').style.display = 'none';
        }
        function limpiarSeleccionAlumno() {
            document.getElementById('p-alumno').value = '';
            document.getElementById('p-alumno-search').value = '';
            document.getElementById('p-alumno-search').style.background = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.12)';
            document.getElementById('p-alumno-search').style.fontWeight = 'normal';
            document.getElementById('p-alumno-clear').style.display = 'none';
            document.getElementById('p-alumno-results').style.display = 'none';
        }
        async function cargarAlumnosPorGrupo() {
            const grupoId = document.getElementById('p-grupo').value;
            const searchInput = document.getElementById('p-alumno-search');
            if (!grupoId) {
                searchInput.value = '';
                searchInput.disabled = true;
                _alumnosDelGrupo = [];
                return;
            }
            searchInput.placeholder = '⏳ Cargando...';
            searchInput.disabled = true;
            try {
                const r = await fetch(`/api/alumnos/por-grupo/${grupoId}`);
                _alumnosDelGrupo = await r.json();
                searchInput.placeholder = '👤 Buscar alumno...';
                searchInput.disabled = false;
                searchInput.value = '';
                limpiarSeleccionAlumno();
            } catch (e) {
                console.error("Error loading group students:", e);
                searchInput.placeholder = '❌ Error';
            }
        }
        let _todosLibrosPrest = []; // cache for filterable book list
        async function _loadLibrosPrest() {
            const libros = await (await fetch('/api/libros')).json();
            _todosLibrosPrest = libros.filter(l => l.cantidad_disponible > 0);
        }
        function filtrarLibrosPrest() {
            const q = normalizeString(document.getElementById('p-libro-search').value.trim());
            const resultsEl = document.getElementById('p-libro-results');
            // Clear any previous selection when typing
            document.getElementById('p-libro').value = '';
            document.getElementById('p-libro-selected').style.display = 'none';
            document.getElementById('p-libro-clear').style.display = 'none';
            if (!q) { resultsEl.style.display = 'none'; resultsEl.innerHTML = ''; return; }
            const filtered = _todosLibrosPrest.filter(l =>
                normalizeString(l.titulo || '').includes(q) || normalizeString(l.autor || '').includes(q)
            ).slice(0, 12);
            if (!filtered.length) {
                resultsEl.innerHTML = '<div style="padding:12px 16px;color:#888;font-size:.875rem;">Sin resultados</div>';
                resultsEl.style.display = 'block';
                return;
            }
            resultsEl.innerHTML = filtered.map(l => `
                <div onclick="seleccionarLibroPrest(${l.id}, '${(l.titulo || '').replace(/'/g, "\\'")}', ${l.cantidad_disponible})"
                    style="padding:10px 16px;cursor:pointer;border-bottom:1px solid #f0f0f0;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;font-size:.875rem;transition:background .15s;"
                    onmouseover="this.style.background='#f0f5ff'" onmouseout="this.style.background='white'">
                    <div>
                        <div style="font-weight:600;color:#003366;">${l.titulo}</div>
                        ${l.autor ? `<div style="color:#666;font-size:.8rem;">${l.autor}</div>` : ''}
                    </div>
                    <span style="background:#e8f0fe;color:#003366;font-size:.75rem;font-weight:700;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:20px;white-space:nowrap;">${l.cantidad_disponible} disp.</span>
                </div>
            `).join('');
            resultsEl.style.display = 'block';
        }
        function seleccionarLibroPrest(id, titulo, disp) {
            document.getElementById('p-libro').value = id;
            document.getElementById('p-libro-search').value = '';
            document.getElementById('p-libro-results').style.display = 'none';
            document.getElementById('p-libro-results').innerHTML = '';
            document.getElementById('p-libro-selected-text').textContent = `${titulo} (${disp} disp.)`;
            document.getElementById('p-libro-selected').style.display = 'block';
            document.getElementById('p-libro-clear').style.display = 'block';
        }
        function limpiarSeleccionLibro() {
            document.getElementById('p-libro').value = '';
            document.getElementById('p-libro-search').value = '';
            document.getElementById('p-libro-results').style.display = 'none';
            document.getElementById('p-libro-selected').style.display = 'none';
            document.getElementById('p-libro-clear').style.display = 'none';
        }
        async function _loadStudentsHub() {
            try {
                const response = await fetch('/api/alumnos');
                const data = await response.json();
                const alumnosList = data.alumnos || data;
                const pSel = document.getElementById('p-alumno');
                const hSel = document.getElementById('h-alumno');
                const epSel = document.getElementById('ep-alumno');
                const opts = '<option value="">-- Selecciona un alumno --</option>' +
                    alumnosList.sort((a, b) => a.nombre.localeCompare(b.nombre))
                        .map(a => `<option value="${a.id}">${a.nombre}</option>`).join('');
                if (pSel) pSel.innerHTML = opts;
                if (hSel) hSel.innerHTML = opts;
                if (epSel) epSel.innerHTML = opts;
            } catch (e) { console.error("Error loading students:", e); }
        }
        async function _loadActivos() {
            try {
                const cfg0 = await (await fetch('/api/config')).json();
                _plazoGlobal = cfg0.max_dias_prestamo || 7;
                _todosActivos = await (await fetch('/api/prestamos/activos')).json();
                filtrarActivos();
            } catch (e) { console.error("Error loading activos:", e); }
        }
        function filtrarActivos() {
            const q = normalizeString(document.getElementById('p-search-activos') ? document.getElementById('p-search-activos').value : '');
            const filtered = _todosActivos.filter(p =>
                normalizeString(p.alumno_nombre || '').includes(q) || normalizeString(p.libro_titulo || '').includes(q));
            _renderActivos(filtered);
        }
        function _renderActivos(data) {
            const cont = document.getElementById('pst-activos-cont');
            if (!cont) return;
            if (!data.length) {
                cont.innerHTML = '<div class="empty-state"><div class="icon">✅</div><p>No hay préstamos activos para el filtro.</p></div>';
                return;
            }
            cont.innerHTML = `<table class="table"><thead><tr><th>Alumno</th><th>Libro</th><th>Fecha</th><th>Días</th><th>Acciones</th></tr></thead><tbody>
                ${data.map(p => `<tr>
                    <td>${p.alumno_nombre}</td><td>${p.libro_titulo}</td><td>${p.fecha_prestamo}</td>
                    <td><span class="avail-badge ${p.dias_transcurridos > _plazoGlobal ? 'avail-none' : 'avail-ok'}">${p.dias_transcurridos}d</span></td>
                    <td style="display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
                        <button class="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onclick="openDevolucion(${p.id},'${p.alumno_nombre.replace(/'/g, "\\'")}','${p.libro_titulo.replace(/'/g, "\\'")}','${p.fecha_prestamo}')">📥 Devolver</button>
                        <button class="btn btn-sm" style="background:#fff3cd;color:#856404;border:1px solid #ffc107;" onclick="openEditPrest(${p.id})">✏️</button>
                        <button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm" onclick="eliminarPrestamo(${p.id})">🗑️</button>
                    </td>
                </tr>`).join('')}
            </tbody></table>`;
        }
        async function _loadRetrasos() {
            try {
                const cfg = await (await fetch('/api/config')).json();
                const plazo = cfg.max_dias_prestamo || 7;
                _todosRetrasos = await (await fetch(`/api/alertas/retrasos?dias=${plazo}`)).json();
                filtrarRetrasos();
            } catch (e) { console.error("Error loading retrasos:", e); }
        }
        function filtrarRetrasos() {
            const q = normalizeString(document.getElementById('p-search-retrasos') ? document.getElementById('p-search-retrasos').value : '');
            const filtered = _todosRetrasos.filter(p =>
                normalizeString(p.nombre || '').includes(q) || normalizeString(p.titulo || '').includes(q));
            _renderRetrasos(filtered);
        }
        function _renderRetrasos(data) {
            const cont = document.getElementById('pst-retrasos-cont');
            if (!cont) return;
            if (!data.length) {
                cont.innerHTML = '<div class="empty-state"><div class="icon">🎉</div><p>¡Sin retrasos para el filtro!</p></div>';
                return;
            }
            cont.innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-danger">⚠️ ${data.length} libro(s) coinciden con la búsqueda</div>
                <table class="table"><thead><tr><th>Alumno</th><th>Libro</th><th>Desde</th><th>Días</th><th>Acciones</th></tr></thead><tbody>
                ${data.map(p => `<tr>
                    <td>${p.nombre}</td><td>${p.titulo}</td><td>${p.fecha_prestamo}</td>
                    <td><span class="avail-badge avail-none">${p.dias}d</span></td>
                    <td style="display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
                        <button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm" onclick="openDevolucion(${p.id},'${p.nombre.replace(/'/g, "\\'")}','${p.titulo.replace(/'/g, "\\'")}','${p.fecha_prestamo}')">📥 Devolver</button>
                        <button class="btn btn-sm" style="background:#fff3cd;color:#856404;border:1px solid #ffc107;" onclick="openEditPrest(${p.id})">✏️</button>
                        <button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm" onclick="eliminarPrestamo(${p.id})">🗑️</button>
                    </td>
                </tr>`).join('')}
            </tbody></table>`;
        }
        async function _loadHistorial() {
            _todosHistorial = await (await fetch('/api/prestamos/historial')).json();
            _renderHistorial(_todosHistorial, 'pst-historial-cont', 'ph'); // Tab Préstamos
            _renderHistorial(_todosHistorial, 'h-historial-gral-cont', 'gh'); // Tab Historial (Nueva)
        }
        function filtrarHistorial() {
            const q = normalizeString(document.getElementById('p-search-hist').value);
            const filtered = _todosHistorial.filter(p =>
                normalizeString(p.alumno_nombre || '').includes(q) || normalizeString(p.libro_titulo || '').includes(q));
            _renderHistorial(filtered, 'pst-historial-cont', 'ph');
        }
        function filtrarHistorialGral() {
            const q = normalizeString(document.getElementById('h-search-hist-gral').value);
            const filtered = _todosHistorial.filter(p =>
                normalizeString(p.alumno_nombre || '').includes(q) || normalizeString(p.libro_titulo || '').includes(q));
            _renderHistorial(filtered, 'h-historial-gral-cont', 'gh');
            if (q) expandirTodoHistorialGral(true); // Auto-expand when searching
        }
        function _renderHistorial(data, containerId, prefix = 'hist') {
            const cont = document.getElementById(containerId);
            if (!cont) return;
            if (!data.length) {
                cont.innerHTML = '<div class="empty-state"><div class="icon">📭</div><p>Sin registros.</p></div>';
                return;
            }
            // Summary Stats for Historial
            const totalLoans = data.length;
            const returned = data.filter(p => p.estado === 'devuelto').length;
            const active = totalLoans - returned;
            // Calculate Top Reader
            const readerCounts = {};
            let topReader = { name: '—', count: 0 };
            data.forEach(p => {
                const name = p.alumno_nombre || 'Desconocido';
                readerCounts[name] = (readerCounts[name] || 0) + 1;
                if (readerCounts[name] > topReader.count) {
                    topReader = { name: name, count: readerCounts[name] };
                }
            });
            // Calculate Avg Days (only for returned)
            const returnedLoans = data.filter(p => p.estado === 'devuelto' && p.dias_lectura != null);
            const avgDays = returnedLoans.length > 0
                ? (returnedLoans.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.dias_lectura, 0) / returnedLoans.length).toFixed(1)
                : '—';
            // Build summary bar
            let summaryHtml = `
                <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(130px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 25px;">
                    <div style="background:#f0f7ff; padding: 15px; border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid #d0e1f9; text-align: center; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,51,102,0.03);">
                        <div style="font-size: .65rem; color: #5c7c99; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 6px; letter-spacing: 0.5px;">Total</div>
                        <div style="font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 800; color: #003366;">${totalLoans}</div>
                    </div>
                    <div style="background:#f0fff4; padding: 15px; border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid #d0f9db; text-align: center; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(40,167,69,0.03);">
                        <div style="font-size: .65rem; color: #5c996e; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 6px; letter-spacing: 0.5px;">Devueltos</div>
                        <div style="font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 800; color: #28a745;">${returned}</div>
                    </div>
                    <div style="background:#fffaf0; padding: 15px; border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid #f9ecd0; text-align: center; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(243,156,18,0.03);">
                        <div style="font-size: .65rem; color: #997c5c; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 6px; letter-spacing: 0.5px;">Pendientes</div>
                        <div style="font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 800; color: #f39c12;">${active}</div>
                    </div>
                    <div style="background:#f5f3ff; padding: 15px; border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid #e9d5ff; text-align: center; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(139,92,246,0.03);">
                        <div style="font-size: .65rem; color: #7c3aed; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 6px; letter-spacing: 0.5px;">Top Lector</div>
                        <div style="font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 800; color: #6d28d9; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;" title="${topReader.name}">${topReader.name}</div>
                        <div style="font-size: .7rem; color: #8b5cf6;">${topReader.count} libros</div>
                    </div>
                    <div style="background:#fdf2f2; padding: 15px; border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid #fee2e2; text-align: center; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(239,68,68,0.03);">
                        <div style="font-size: .65rem; color: #dc2626; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 6px; letter-spacing: 0.5px;">Media Días</div>
                        <div style="font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 800; color: #b91c1c;">${avgDays}</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;
            // Group by student
            const byAlumno = {};
            data.forEach(p => {
                const key = p.alumno_nombre || 'Desconocido';
                if (!byAlumno[key]) byAlumno[key] = [];
                byAlumno[key].push(p);
            });
            const alumnosOrdenados = Object.keys(byAlumno).sort((a, b) => a.localeCompare(b));
            let groupsHtml = '';
            alumnosOrdenados.forEach((nombre, idx) => {
                const prestamos = byAlumno[nombre];
                const nActivos = prestamos.filter(p => p.estado !== 'devuelto').length;
                const groupId = `${prefix}-group-${idx}`;
                groupsHtml += `
                <div class="historial-group" style="background:white; border: 1px solid #eef2f7; border-radius: 14px; margin-bottom: 12px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.03); transition: all 0.2s;">
                    <div onclick="toggleHistGroup('${groupId}', '${prefix}-${idx}')" 
                         style="padding: 16px 20px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; border-left: 5px solid ${nActivos > 0 ? '#f39c12' : '#28a745'}; background: #fff;">
                        <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px;">
                            <span id="${groupId}-arrow" style="font-size: .8rem; color: #94a3b8; transition: transform 0.2s;">▶</span>
                            <div>
                                <div style="font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b; font-size: 1rem;">${nombre}</div>
                                <div style="font-size: .75rem; color: #64748b; margin-top: 1px;">
                                    ${prestamos.length} libro${prestamos.length > 1 ? 's' : ''} en total
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div style="display: flex; gap: 8px;">
                            ${nActivos > 0 ? `<span style="background: #fff9eb; color: #b45309; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: .7rem; font-weight: 700; border: 1px solid #fef3c7;">${nActivos} Pendiente${nActivos > 1 ? 's' : ''}</span>` : ''}
                            <span style="background: #f0fdf4; color: #15803d; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: .7rem; font-weight: 700; border: 1px solid #dcfce7;">Lecturas: ${prestamos.length}</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div id="${groupId}-content" style="display: none; border-top: 1px solid #f1f5f9; background: #fafbfc;">
                        <table style="width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: .85rem;">
                            <thead style="background: #f8fafc; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;">
                                <tr>
                                    <th style="text-align: left; padding: 12px 20px; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700; font-size: .7rem; text-transform: uppercase;">Libro</th>
                                    <th style="text-align: left; padding: 12px 10px; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700; font-size: .7rem; text-transform: uppercase;">Préstamo</th>
                                    <th style="text-align: left; padding: 12px 10px; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700; font-size: .7rem; text-transform: uppercase;">Devolución</th>
                                    <th style="text-align: left; padding: 12px 10px; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700; font-size: .7rem; text-transform: uppercase;">Estado</th>
                                    <th style="text-align: right; padding: 12px 20px;"></th>
                                </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                                ${prestamos.sort((a, b) => b.id - a.id).map(p => {
                    const isDevuelto = p.estado === 'devuelto';
                    const isRetraso = !isDevuelto && p.dias_lectura > (_plazoGlobal || 7);
                    return `
                                    <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; transition: background 0.1s;" onmouseover="this.style.background='#f1f5f9'" onmouseout="this.style.background='transparent'">
                                        <td style="padding: 12px 20px;">
                                            <div style="font-weight: 600; color: #1e293b;">${p.libro_titulo}</div>
                                            <div style="font-size: .7rem; color: #94a3b8;">${p.dias_lectura} días de lectura</div>
                                        </td>
                                        <td style="padding: 12px 10px; color: #475569;">${p.fecha_prestamo}</td>
                                        <td style="padding: 12px 10px; color: #475569;">${p.fecha_devolucion || '—'}</td>
                                        <td style="padding: 12px 10px;">
                                            <span class="avail-badge ${isDevuelto ? 'avail-ok' : (isRetraso ? 'avail-none' : 'avail-low')}">
                                                ${isDevuelto ? 'Devuelto' : (isRetraso ? 'RETRASO' : 'En préstamo')}
                                            </span>
                                        </td>
                                        <td style="padding: 12px 20px; text-align: right;">
                                            <div style="display: flex; gap: 6px; justify-content: flex-end;">
                                                ${isDevuelto ? `<button onclick="reactivarPrestamo(${p.id})" style="border: none; background: #eef2f7; color: #475569; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;" title="Reactivar">↺</button>` : ''}
                                                <button onclick="openEditPrest(${p.id})" style="border: none; background: #fff3cd; color: #856404; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;" title="Editar">✏️</button>
                                                <button onclick="eliminarPrestamo(${p.id})" style="border: none; background: #fee2e2; color: #b91c1c; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;" title="Eliminar">🗑️</button>
                                            </div>
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>
                                    `;
                }).join('')}
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                </div>
                `;
            });
            cont.innerHTML = summaryHtml + groupsHtml;
        }
        function toggleHistGroup(groupId, rowClassSuffix) {
            const content = document.getElementById(`${groupId}-content`);
            const arrow = document.getElementById(`${groupId}-arrow`);
            if (!content) return;
            const isOpen = content.style.display !== 'none';
            content.style.display = isOpen ? 'none' : 'block';
            if (arrow) arrow.style.transform = isOpen ? '' : 'rotate(90deg)';
        }
        function expandirTodoHistorial(expand) {
            const cont = document.getElementById('pst-historial-cont');
            cont.querySelectorAll('div[id$="-content"]').forEach(div => div.style.display = expand ? 'block' : 'none');
            cont.querySelectorAll('[id$="-arrow"]').forEach(a => a.style.transform = expand ? 'rotate(90deg)' : '');
        }
        function expandirTodoHistorialGral(expand) {
            const cont = document.getElementById('h-historial-gral-cont');
            cont.querySelectorAll('div[id$="-content"]').forEach(div => div.style.display = expand ? 'block' : 'none');
            cont.querySelectorAll('[id$="-arrow"]').forEach(a => a.style.transform = expand ? 'rotate(90deg)' : '');
        }
        // ── EDIT / DELETE PRESTAMO ─────────────────────────────────
        async function openEditPrest(id) {
            const r = await (await fetch(`/api/prestamos/${id}`)).json();
            if (!r.ok) { alert(r.error); return; }
            const p = r.prestamo;
            document.getElementById('ep-id').value = id;
            document.getElementById('ep-fecha').value = p.fecha_prestamo;
            document.getElementById('ep-obs').value = p.observaciones || '';
            document.getElementById('ep-alert').innerHTML = '';
            // Populate alumno select
            const selA = document.getElementById('ep-alumno');
            selA.innerHTML = '';
            const alumnos = await (await fetch('/api/alumnos')).json();
            (alumnos.alumnos || alumnos).forEach(a => {
                const opt = document.createElement('option');
                opt.value = a.id; opt.textContent = a.nombre;
                if (a.id === p.alumno_id) opt.selected = true;
                selA.appendChild(opt);
            });
            // Populate libro select (all books, mark current)
            const selL = document.getElementById('ep-libro');
            selL.innerHTML = '';
            const libros = await (await fetch('/api/libros')).json();
            libros.forEach(l => {
                if (l.cantidad_disponible > 0 || l.id === p.libro_id) {
                    const opt = document.createElement('option');
                    opt.value = l.id;
                    opt.textContent = l.id === p.libro_id
                        ? `${l.titulo} (actual)`
                        : `${l.titulo} (${l.cantidad_disponible} disp.)`;
                    if (l.id === p.libro_id) opt.selected = true;
                    selL.appendChild(opt);
                }
            });
            document.getElementById('editPrestModal').style.display = 'flex';
        }
        async function guardarEditPrest() {
            const id = document.getElementById('ep-id').value;
            const body = {
                alumno_id: parseInt(document.getElementById('ep-alumno').value),
                libro_id: parseInt(document.getElementById('ep-libro').value),
                fecha_prestamo: document.getElementById('ep-fecha').value,
                observaciones: document.getElementById('ep-obs').value
            };
            const d = await (await fetch(`/api/prestamos/${id}`, {
                method: 'PUT', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify(body)
            })).json();
            if (d.ok) {
                closeEditPrest();
                _prestamosLoaded = false; initPrestamos(); loadBooks(); loadStats();
                setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 500);
            } else {
                document.getElementById('ep-alert').innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-danger">❌ ${d.error}</div>`;
            }
        }
        function closeEditPrest() { document.getElementById('editPrestModal').style.display = 'none'; }
        async function eliminarPrestamo(id) {
            if (!confirm('¿Eliminar este préstamo? Si estaba activo, el libro volverá a estar disponible.')) return;
            const d = await (await fetch(`/api/prestamos/${id}`, { method: 'DELETE' })).json();
            if (d.ok) { _prestamosLoaded = false; initPrestamos(); loadBooks(); loadStats(); location.reload(); }
            else alert(`Error: ${d.error}`);
        }
        async function reactivarPrestamo(id) {
            if (!confirm('¿Reactivar este préstamo? Se marcará como activo y se descontará 1 unidad del libro disponible.')) return;
            const d = await (await fetch(`/api/prestamos/${id}/reactivar`, { method: 'POST' })).json();
            if (d.ok) {
                _prestamosLoaded = false;
                initPrestamos();
                loadBooks();
                loadStats();
                const hSel = document.getElementById('h-alumno');
                if (hSel && hSel.value) showHistorialAlumno();
                location.reload();
            } else {
                alert(`Error: ${d.error}`);
            }
        }
        async function _updateStatsPrest() {
            try {
                const d = await (await fetch('/api/estadisticas/lectura')).json();
                document.getElementById('pst-activos').textContent = d.prestamos_activos;
                document.getElementById('pst-total').textContent = d.total_prestamos;
            } catch (e) { }
            try {
                const cfg = await (await fetch('/api/config')).json();
                _plazoGlobal = cfg.max_dias_prestamo || 7;
                const r = await (await fetch(`/api/alertas/retrasos?dias=${_plazoGlobal}`)).json();
                document.getElementById('pst-retrasos').textContent = r.length;
                const lbl = document.getElementById('pst-retrasos-label');
                if (lbl) lbl.textContent = `+${_plazoGlobal} días`;
                document.getElementById('pst-retrasos').style.color = r.length > 0 ? '#c62828' : '#2e7d32';
            } catch (e) { }
        }
        function guardarPlazo(dias) {
            fetch('/api/config', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify({ max_dias_prestamo: parseInt(dias) })
            }).then(() => {
                _plazoGlobal = parseInt(dias);
                const lbl = document.getElementById('pst-retrasos-label');
                if (lbl) lbl.textContent = `+${dias} días`;
                _prestamosLoaded = false;
                initPrestamos();
            });
        }
        async function registrarPrestamo() {
            const alumno_id = document.getElementById('p-alumno').value;
            const libro_id = document.getElementById('p-libro').value;
            const fecha_prestamo = document.getElementById('p-fecha').value;
            const alertEl = document.getElementById('prest-alert');
            const keepStudent = document.getElementById('keep-student').checked;

            if (!alumno_id || !libro_id) {
                alertEl.innerHTML = '<div class="alert alert-danger">⚠️ Selecciona un alumno y un libro</div>';
                return;
            }
            const d = await (await fetch('/api/prestamos', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify({ alumno_id: parseInt(alumno_id), libro_id: parseInt(libro_id), fecha_prestamo })
            })).json();
            if (d.ok) {
                showToast(`✅ ${d.mensaje}`);
                
                // Partial refresh logic
                if (!keepStudent) {
                    document.getElementById('p-alumno').value = '';
                    limpiarSeleccionAlumno();
                    // Si no mantenemos el alumno, limpiamos también el grupo (comportamiento original pero más limpio)
                    // document.getElementById('p-grupo').value = ''; 
                } else {
                    // Si mantenemos el alumno, nos aseguramos de que el buscador refleje el nombre seleccionado
                    const alumnoNombre = document.getElementById('p-alumno-search').value;
                    const alumnoId = document.getElementById('p-alumno').value;
                    if (alumnoId) {
                        seleccionarAlumno(alumnoId, alumnoNombre);
                    }
                }
                limpiarSeleccionLibro();
                
                // Reload data in background
                _prestamosLoaded = false;
                initPrestamos(); 
                loadBooks(); 
                loadStats();
                loadRankingChart();
            } else {
                alertEl.innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-danger">❌ ${d.error}</div>`;
            }
        }
        function showToast(msg) {
            const toast = document.getElementById('successToast');
            const msgEl = document.getElementById('successToastMsg');
            if (toast && msgEl) {
                msgEl.textContent = msg;
                toast.style.display = 'flex';
                setTimeout(() => { toast.style.display = 'none'; }, 2500);
            }
        }
        function openDevolucion(id, alumno, libro, fechaPrestamo) {
            document.getElementById('dev-id').value = id;
            document.getElementById('dev-fecha').value = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
            document.getElementById('dev-obs').value = '';
            document.getElementById('dev-info').innerHTML = `<strong>${alumno}</strong><br>📖 <em>${libro}</em><br><small>Prestado: ${fechaPrestamo}</small>`;
            document.getElementById('devModal').style.display = 'flex';
        }
        async function confirmarDevolucion() {
            const id = document.getElementById('dev-id').value;
            const body = { fecha_devolucion: document.getElementById('dev-fecha').value, observaciones: document.getElementById('dev-obs').value };
            const d = await (await fetch(`/api/prestamos/${id}/devolver`, {
                method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(body)
            })).json();
            if (d.ok) {
                closeDevModal();
                showToast("✅ Devolución registrada correctamente");
                
                // Partial refresh
                _prestamosLoaded = false;
                initPrestamos();
                loadBooks();
                loadStats();
                
                const hSel = document.getElementById('h-alumno');
                if (hSel && hSel.value) showHistorialAlumno();
            }
            else alert(`Error: ${d.error}`);
        }
        // --- PRESTAMO RAPIDO (Desde Catalogo) ---
        let _prAllAlumnos = []; // cache for the rapid modal filtering
        async function openPrestamoRapido(libroId, titulo, autor) {
            document.getElementById('pr-libro-id').value = libroId;
            document.getElementById('pr-info').innerHTML = `Vas a prestar: <strong>${titulo}</strong> <br><small style="color:#666">${autor}</small>`;
            document.getElementById('pr-fecha').value = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
            document.getElementById('pr-alert').innerHTML = '';
            const selG = document.getElementById('pr-grupo');
            const selA = document.getElementById('pr-alumno');
            selA.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- Selecciona primero un grupo --</option>';
            selA.disabled = true;
            document.getElementById('prestamoRapidoModal').style.display = 'flex';
            // Load Groups only
            try {
                const rGrupos = await fetch('/api/grupos');
                const gruposData = await rGrupos.json();
                selG.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- Selecciona un grupo --</option>' +
                    gruposData.map(g => `<option value="${g.id}">${g.nombre}</option>`).join('');
                selG.onchange = filterPrAlumnosByGrupo; // Attach event listener
                // Auto-select first group if only one
                if (gruposData.length === 1) {
                    selG.value = gruposData[0].id;
                    filterPrAlumnosByGrupo();
                }
            } catch (e) {
                selG.innerHTML = '<option value="">❌ Error cargando grupos</option>';
            }
        }
        async function filterPrAlumnosByGrupo() {
            const grupoId = document.getElementById('pr-grupo').value;
            const selA = document.getElementById('pr-alumno');
            if (!grupoId) {
                selA.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- Selecciona primero un grupo --</option>';
                selA.disabled = true;
                return;
            }
            selA.innerHTML = '<option value="">⏳ Cargando alumnos...</option>';
            selA.disabled = true;
            try {
                const r = await fetch(`/api/alumnos/por-grupo/${grupoId}`);
                const alumnos = await r.json();
                selA.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- Buscar un alumno --</option>' +
                    alumnos.map(a => `<option value="${a.id}">${a.nombre}</option>`).join('');
                selA.disabled = false;
            } catch (e) {
                selA.innerHTML = '<option value="">❌ Error cargando alumnos</option>';
            }
        }
        async function confirmarPrestamoRapido() {
            const alumno_id = document.getElementById('pr-alumno').value;
            const libro_id = document.getElementById('pr-libro-id').value;
            const fecha_prestamo = document.getElementById('pr-fecha').value;
            const alertEl = document.getElementById('pr-alert');
            if (!alumno_id) {
                alertEl.innerHTML = '<div class="alert alert-danger">⚠️ Por favor, selecciona un alumno.</div>';
                return;
            }
            try {
                const d = await (await fetch('/api/prestamos', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify({ alumno_id: parseInt(alumno_id), libro_id: parseInt(libro_id), fecha_prestamo })
                })).json();
                if (d.ok) {
                    showToast(`✅ ${d.mensaje}`);
                    
                    // Refresh main data in background
                    loadBooks();
                    loadStats();
                    _prestamosLoaded = false;
                    
                    // Close modal and refresh loans tab if active
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        closeModal('prestamoRapidoModal');
                        if (document.getElementById('tab-prestamos').classList.contains('active')) {
                            initPrestamos();
                        }
                    }, 1000);
                } else {
                    alertEl.innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-danger">❌ ${d.error}</div>`;
                }
            } catch (e) {
                alertEl.innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-danger">❌ Error de conexión</div>`;
            }
        }
        function closeDevModal() { document.getElementById('devModal').style.display = 'none'; }
        // Jump to tab based on URL hash
        if (window.location.hash === '#prestamos') {
            document.getElementById('btnTabPrestamos').click();
        } else if (window.location.hash === '#catalogo') {
            document.getElementById('btnTabCatalogo').click();
        }
        // Init view from localStorage + load data
        if (currentView === 'list') {
            document.getElementById('btnGrid').classList.remove('active');
            document.getElementById('btnList').classList.add('active');
        }
        // Initialize data
        loadBooks();
        loadStats();
        loadRankingChart();
        _loadStudentsHub();
    </script>
</div>
</div>
</body>
</html>
==================================================

            background: #f8d7da;
            padding: 10px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            display: none;
        }

        /* ── Primer arranque ────────────────────────────── */
        .setup-badge {
            display: inline-block;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a7a4a, #28a745);
            color: white;
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            font-weight: 700;

<body>
    <div class="login-card">
        <h1 id="appTitle" style="cursor: pointer; user-select: none;">📘 Cuaderno del Tutor</h1>
        <p id="appSubtitle">Introduce tu código de acceso secreto.</p>

        <div id="errorBox" class="error-msg"></div>

        <!-- ══ FORM: LOGIN NORMAL ══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
        <form id="loginForm">
            <div class="form-group">
                <input type="text" id="username" placeholder="Usuario..." required autofocus>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
                <input type="password" id="password" placeholder="Contraseña..." required>
            </div>
            <button type="submit" class="btn-submit">Entrar</button>
            <div style="margin-top: 15px; text-align: center;">
                <a href="#" onclick="abrirRecuperar(); return false;"
                    style="color: #003366; font-size: 0.9rem; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600;">¿Olvidaste tu
                    contraseña?</a>
            </div>
        </form>

        <!-- ══ FORM: RECUPERAR CONTRASEÑA ═══════════════════════════════════ -->
        <form id="recoverForm" style="display: none; padding-top: 10px;">
            <p style="font-size: 0.9rem; color: #555; margin-bottom: 15px;">Ingresa tu usuario para recuperar la
                contraseña.</p>
            <div class="form-group" id="recUserGroup">
                <input type="text" id="recUsername" placeholder="Usuario..." required>
                <button type="button" onclick="pedirPregunta()" class="btn-submit cyan"
                    style="margin-top: 15px;">Siguiente</button>
            </div>

            <div id="recQGroups" style="display: none; text-align: left;">
                <p id="lblPregunta"
                    style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 15px; color: #003366; font-size: 1rem; border-left: 3px solid #17a2b8; padding-left: 10px;">
                </p>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <input type="text" id="recRespuesta" placeholder="Tu respuesta a la pregunta..." required>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group" style="margin-top: 15px;">
                    <input type="password" id="recNewPwd" placeholder="Nueva Contraseña..." required>
                </div>
                <button type="submit" class="btn-submit verde" style="margin-top: 10px;">Restablecer y
                    Entrar</button>
            </div>

            <div style="margin-top: 20px; text-align: center;">
                <a href="#" onclick="cancelarRecuperar(); return false;"
                    style="color: #6c757d; font-size: 0.9rem; text-decoration: none;">Volver al Login</a>
            </div>
        </form>

        <!-- ══ FORM: PRIMER ARRANQUE (sin usuarios) ══════════════════════════ -->
        <div id="setupForm" style="display: none;">
            <div class="setup-badge">✨ Primera puesta en marcha</div>
            <div class="setup-hint">
                Bienvenido/a. Aún no hay ningún usuario registrado.<br>
                Crea tu cuenta de <strong>Administrador</strong> para empezar.
            </div>
            <form id="setupInnerForm">
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="setupUsername">Nombre de usuario</label>
                    <input type="text" id="setupUsername" placeholder="p.ej. maria" required autofocus minlength="3">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="setupPassword">Contraseña</label>
                    <input type="password" id="setupPassword" placeholder="Mínimo 6 caracteres" required minlength="6"
                        oninput="updateStrength(this.value)">
                    <div class="password-strength" id="pwdStrength"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="setupConfirm">Confirmar contraseña</label>
                    <input type="password" id="setupConfirm" placeholder="Repite la contraseña" required>
                </div>
                <button type="submit" class="btn-submit verde">Crear cuenta y entrar →</button>
            </form>
        </div>

    <script>
        // ── Comprobar en el arranque si necesita setup ────────────────────────
        (async function checkSetup() {
            try {
                const res = await fetch('/api/setup');
                const data = await res.json();
                if (data.ok && data.needs_setup) {
                    // Ocultar login, mostrar setup
                    document.getElementById('loginForm').style.display = 'none';
                    document.getElementById('setupForm').style.display = 'block';
                    document.getElementById('appSubtitle').textContent = 'Configura tu primera cuenta.';
                }
            } catch (e) {
                // Si falla la petición, mostramos el login normal (fallo silencioso)
            }
        })();

        // ── Login normal ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
        document.getElementById('loginForm').addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            const username = document.getElementById('username').value;
            const password = document.getElementById('password').value;
            const errorBox = document.getElementById('errorBox');

            errorBox.style.display = 'none';

            try {
                const res = await fetch('/login', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify({ username, password })
                });

                const data = await res.json();
                if (data.ok) {
                    window.location.href = '/';
                } else {
                    errorBox.innerText = data.error || 'Contraseña incorrecta';
                    errorBox.style.display = 'block';
                }
            } catch (err) {
                errorBox.innerText = 'Error de conexión con el servidor.';
                errorBox.style.display = 'block';
            }
        });

        // ── Setup primer usuario ──────────────────────────────────────────────
        document.getElementById('setupInnerForm').addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            const username = document.getElementById('setupUsername').value.trim();
            const password = document.getElementById('setupPassword').value;
            const confirm = document.getElementById('setupConfirm').value;
            const errorBox = document.getElementById('errorBox');

            errorBox.style.display = 'none';

            try {
                const res = await fetch('/api/setup', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify({ username, password, confirm })
                });

                const data = await res.json();
                if (data.ok) {
                    window.location.href = '/';
                } else {
                    errorBox.innerText = data.error || 'Error al crear el usuario';
                    errorBox.style.display = 'block';
                }
            } catch (err) {
                errorBox.innerText = 'Error de conexión con el servidor.';
                errorBox.style.display = 'block';
            }
        });

        // ── Fuerza de contraseña ──────────────────────────────────────────────
        function updateStrength(val) {
            const bar = document.getElementById('pwdStrength');
            if (!bar) return;
            const len = val.length;
            if (len === 0) { bar.style.background = '#eee'; return; }
            if (len < 6) { bar.style.background = '#dc3545'; return; }
            if (len < 10) { bar.style.background = '#ffc107'; return; }
            bar.style.background = '#28a745';
        }

        // ── Recuperar contraseña ──────────────────────────────────────────────
        document.getElementById('recoverForm').addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            const username = document.getElementById('recUsername').value.trim();
            const respuesta = document.getElementById('recRespuesta').value.trim();
            const new_password = document.getElementById('recNewPwd').value.trim();
            const errorBox = document.getElementById('errorBox');

            errorBox.style.display = 'none';

            try {
                const res = await fetch('/api/recover_password', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify({ username, respuesta, new_password })
                });

                const data = await res.json();
                if (data.ok) {
                    alert('¡Contraseña restablecida con éxito!');
                    window.location.reload();
                } else {
                    errorBox.innerText = data.error || 'Respuesta incorrecta';
                    errorBox.style.display = 'block';
                }
            } catch (err) {
                errorBox.innerText = 'Error de conexión con el servidor.';
                errorBox.style.display = 'block';
            }
        });

        function abrirRecuperar() {
            document.getElementById('loginForm').style.display = 'none';
            document.getElementById('recoverForm').style.display = 'block';
            document.getElementById('errorBox').style.display = 'none';
            document.getElementById('recUsername').value = document.getElementById('username').value;
            document.getElementById('recUsername').focus();
        }

        function cancelarRecuperar() {
            document.getElementById('recoverForm').style.display = 'none';
            document.getElementById('loginForm').style.display = 'block';
            document.getElementById('errorBox').style.display = 'none';

            document.getElementById('recQGroups').style.display = 'none';
            document.getElementById('recUserGroup').style.display = 'block';
            document.getElementById('recRespuesta').value = '';
            document.getElementById('recNewPwd').value = '';
        }

        async function pedirPregunta() {
            const username = document.getElementById('recUsername').value.trim();
            const errorBox = document.getElementById('errorBox');
            errorBox.style.display = 'none';

            if (!username) {
                errorBox.innerText = 'Por favor, introduce tu usuario.';
                errorBox.style.display = 'block';
                return;
            }

            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/api/recover_password?username=${encodeURIComponent(username)}`);
                const data = await res.json();
                if (data.ok) {
                    document.getElementById('recUserGroup').style.display = 'none';
                    document.getElementById('recQGroups').style.display = 'block';
                    document.getElementById('lblPregunta').innerText = "¿" + data.pregunta + "?";
                    document.getElementById('recRespuesta').focus();
                } else {
                    errorBox.innerText = data.error || 'Usuario no válido';
                    errorBox.style.display = 'block';
                }
            } catch (err) {
                errorBox.innerText = 'Error de conexión con el servidor.';
                errorBox.style.display = 'block';
            }
        }

        // ── Easter egg: reseteo de emergencia ────────────────────────────────
        let titleClickCount = 0;
        let titleClickTimer = null;
        document.getElementById('appTitle').addEventListener('click', () => {
            titleClickCount++;
            if (titleClickTimer) clearTimeout(titleClickTimer);

            titleClickTimer = setTimeout(() => {
                titleClickCount = 0;
            }, 2000);

            if (titleClickCount >= 5) {
                titleClickCount = 0;
                if (confirm('¿Ejecutar reseteo de emergencia local? Esto pondrá las contraseñas de todos los administradores a "1234".')) {
                    fetch('/api/emergency_reset', { method: 'POST' })
                        .then(res => res.json())
                        .then(data => {
                            if (data.ok) {
                                alert('✅ ' + data.mensaje);
                                window.location.reload();
                            } else {
                                alert('❌ ' + (data.error || 'Autenticación fallida'));
                            }
                        })
                        .catch(err => alert('Error de red. Asegúrate de ejecutar esto en el mismo ordenador servidor.'));
                }
            }
        });
    </script>
    <script src="/static/js/api.js"></script>
</body>

</html>

        <div id="tabTasks" class="section" style="display:none !important;">
            <!-- Unificado en modulo Tareas -->
        </div>
    </div>
    <script>
        // --- UTILITY FUNCTIONS ---
        /**
         * Show toast notification
         * @param {string} message - Message to display
         * @param {string} type - Type: 'success', 'error', 'info'
         * @param {number} duration - Duration in ms (default 3000)
         */
        function showToast(message, type = 'info', duration = 3000) {
            const toast = document.createElement('div');
            toast.className = `toast ${type}`;
            const icon = type === 'success' ? '✅' : type === 'error' ? '❌' : 'ℹ️';
            toast.innerHTML = `<span style="font-size: 1.2rem;">${icon}</span><span>${message}</span>`;
            document.body.appendChild(toast);
            setTimeout(() => {
                toast.style.animation = 'slideOut 0.3s ease';
                setTimeout(() => toast.remove(), 300);
            }, duration);
        }
        /**
         * Show/hide loading overlay
         * @param {boolean} show - Show or hide
         * @param {string} text - Loading text
         */
        function toggleLoading(show, text = 'Cargando...') {
            const overlay = document.getElementById('loadingOverlay');
            const loadingText = document.getElementById('loadingText');
            if (show) {
                loadingText.textContent = text;
                overlay.classList.add('active');
            } else {
                overlay.classList.remove('active');
            }
        }
        /**
         * Validate event data before saving
         * @param {object} data - Event data
         * @returns {object} - {valid: boolean, error: string}
         */
